name: dataStructureVisualizer
description: An interactive tool that renders data structures as 3D objects — because sometimes you need to see a red-black tree from every angle to understand it.

name: programmingHabits
description: A native Linux productivity tool that integrates Pomodoro technique with health reminders. Because even programmers need to drink water and stretch.

name: parallelFileTransfer
description: Accelerates large file transfers by splitting them into chunks and sending them over parallel TCP connections. Networking meets performance engineering.

name: xv6
description: My enhanced fork of the xv6 teaching operating system — because reading Linux kernel code is hard, but reading xv6 is a joy. Added custom features and experiments.

name: DSA
description: Comprehensive implementations of data structures and algorithms, purely in C. All the classics: trees, graphs, sorting, searching — the building blocks of everything.
